creator: robin@isometry.net
text:
Since this PR was opened, dovecot-1.1.1 has been released and forms
the new stable branch. Please apply the attached patch in place of
that above.

Description:
Update mail/dovecot to dovecot-1.1.1.
Release notes: http://dovecot.org/list/dovecot-news/2008-June/000081.html

Regards,
Robin
